subject: grx019_fused_post_chain_real_pass_enablement_smoke
known_gaps: the fused luminance segment's distinct <=8x8 reduce level and double-buffered 1x1 prev/dst luminance targets are NOT exposed by the public Luminance API at the tonemap call site, so patch 0037 binds the single publicly-available 1x1 current luminance buffer to lum_source and prev_luminance (read-only) and the LDR tonemap destination (fully overwritten by the native tonemapper continuation) to dst_color and dst_luminance; a distinct, correct fused binding needs the deferred Luminance-API extension / draw_graph route B (PASS_CONTRACT.md 3.4/5)

math parity is CPU-proven for the fused EMA-x-tonemap (LINEAR + linear_to_srgb) subset only and still pending GPU observation (math_parity_evidence.json status=pending_gpu_dispatch); glow, tonemapper modes other than LINEAR, the rest of the auto-exposure consumer chain, and the one-frame-latency same-frame tonemap replacement are recorded gaps

canonical artifact provenance is hlsl_bridge_workaround (owner-approved): the fused kernel is a texture compute pass, so the GRX-009 texture-intrinsic llc blocker applies and the DXC/DXV/RTS0 hlsl_bridge package is the runtime-mappable canonical artifact (texture_artifact_provenance_policy.json)

the real dispatch path is linked only under the d3d12-recording-shim feature; the shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked, and the patch 0038 result writeback is a SCAFFOLD: the native Godot luminance_reduction + tonemap chain re-renders every frame as the continuation/backstop
note: GRX-019 fused_post_chain gated real-pass enablement gate evidence. The opt-in real-pass arm (dispatch_real_pass, default false) runs against the owner-approved hlsl_bridge workaround canonical package (five textures: src_color SRV t0, lum_source SRV t1, prev_luminance SRV t2, dst_color UAV u0, dst_luminance UAV u1; per-slot texture2d/rwtexture2d binding kinds; 64-byte i64-dims b0; fused EMA-x-tonemap math parity CPU-proven pending GPU) and a d3d12-recording-shim bridge DLL, so every software gate can pass and a real recorded dispatch may return RXGD_STATUS_OK; when the dispatch cannot complete the gate reports first_missing_prerequisite=real_dispatch_recording_failed instead of claiming success. The fused binding is a SCAFFOLD (lum_source and prev_luminance alias the single public 1x1 current luminance buffer; dst_color and dst_luminance target the LDR tonemap destination the native tonemapper fully overwrites), so the patch 0038 result writeback keeps the native Godot luminance_reduction + tonemap chain as the continuation/backstop, default_enable_state stays disabled, and no math-correctness, net-benefit, FPS, or GPU-timestamp claim is made.

dll_fingerprint.feature_note: Bridge built WITH the d3d12-recording-shim feature: the fused_post_chain real-pass arm routes through the linked recording shim, so arming RXGD_CAP_FUSED_POST_CHAIN_REAL_PASS can make rxgd_record_pass return RXGD_STATUS_OK only after a real recorded dispatch. The shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked. target/debug/rurix_godot.dll is a mutable build artifact.

godot_exe_fingerprint.scratch_build_note: Scratch Godot build binaries are NOT committed to the repo. This console exe is a local, gitignored artifact rebuilt from the ignored external/godot-master snapshot with the full 0001,0002,0003,0004,0005,0006,0007,0008,0009,0010,0011,0012,0013,0014,0015,0016,0017,0018,0019,0020,0021,0022,0023,0024,0025,0026,0036,0037,0038 patch stack applied (module_rurix_accel_enabled=yes d3d12=yes). Only its fingerprint is recorded here so the measured evidence stays auditable; re-point RURIX_GRX019_FUSED_POST_CHAIN_GODOT_EXE at an equivalent rebuild to reproduce it.

allowed_godot_errors.message: Could not load global script cache
allowed_godot_errors.rationale: Tolerated Godot global script cache shutdown/cache warning in the generated minimal smoke project; it does not indicate runtime bridge recording failure when the process exits 0 and recording checks pass.
